productionModulesExtended.reason: Adds route fact events to the public character creation route state for partial fills, stale rejection, selected-reference retention, build projection input, and HP maximum build input without adding durable draft fields.
Adds handoff route fact events for source-exact resource deltas, feature-resource deltas, settlement conflicts, and zero-HP Stable lifecycle settlement without adding durable settlement fields.
Extends the existing sheet qRoute witness vocabulary with fact-record events for FCSF-06 character sheet replay.

adapterModules.adapterScope: Replays ordinary Spell Slot, Pact Slot, created-slot expiry, rest-benefit, feature recovery, and spell-resource rejection route facts from the copied connector.
Replays character-battle settlement route facts for source-exact resources, settlement conflicts, and zero-HP Stable lifecycle through existing settlement public route helpers.
Replays character creation draft/fill/finalization route facts through CharacterCreationState.route.
Replays sheet Hit Point Maximum arithmetic-input route facts through existing HP maximum projection facts.

expectedNextReuse.driver: future character creation route connectors needing build/selected-reference fact evidence
future character-battle handoff and settlement route connectors
future character sheet resource/rest/projection route connectors
